## Store.subscribe() method

Subscribes to this store. The subscription will be called when the value within this store has changed.

**Signature:**

```typescript
subscribe(callback: (value: T) => void): () => void;
```

## Parameters

</td><td>

The action to perfom when the value within this store has changed.


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
**Returns:**

() =&gt; void

A callback to unsubscribe from the subscription.
